indices.name: S&P 500
indices.original_text: The S&P 500 closed at a record, as technology stocks led the index to a fifth-straight day of gains. The S&P 500 was up 0.4%. At nearly 6979, it's the closest the index has finished a day to the 7000 mark.

sources.name: Barron's
sources.original_text: The S&P 500 was up 0.4%. At nearly 6979, it's the closest the index has finished a day to the 7000 mark.

sources.name: Trading Economics
sources.original_text: The main stock market index of United States, the US500, rose to 7002 points on January 28, 2026, gaining 0.34% from the previous session.

indices.verification_note: Jan 27 close: ~6978-6979. Jan 28 intraday: ~7002. Sources within 0.3% variance.

indices.name: KOSPI
indices.original_text: Kospi ends above 5,000 for 1st time ever. South Korea's Kospi index on Tuesday closed above the 5,000 mark for the first time since its launch, as foreign and institutional investors stepped up buying.

sources.name: Trading Economics
sources.original_text: South Korea's main stock market index, the KOSPI, rose to 5085 points on January 27, 2026, gaining 2.73% from the previous session. Historically, the South Korea Stock Market reached an all time high of 5084.85 in January of 2026.

sources.name: KED Global
sources.original_text: Kospi ends above 5,000 for 1st time ever; analysts see further upside. South Korea's benchmark stock index, Kospi, closes above the 5,000 market for the first time since its launch on January 27, 2026

sources.name: CNBC
sources.original_text: South Korea's Kospi hits record high for second straight session

indices.verification_note: KOSPI 5,000+ 역대 최고치 확인. 사용자 우려 '코스피 5200 도달'은 현재 5,084 수준으로 아직 미달. 그러나 역대 최고치 경신 중.

indices.name: KOSDAQ
indices.original_text: The secondary bourse Kosdaq soared to its highest level in more than 25 years, Monday, finishing above 1,000 points. The index ended at 1,064.41 points, up 70.48 points, or 7.09 percent.

sources.name: Korea Times
sources.original_text: The secondary bourse Kosdaq soared to its highest level in more than 25 years, Monday, finishing above 1,000 points. The index ended at 1,064.41 points, up 70.48 points, or 7.09 percent. Monday's closing figure was the highest since Sept. 6, 2000, when it reached 1074.10 points.

sources.name: KED Global
sources.original_text: S.Korea's Kosdaq breaks past 1,000 to its 25-year peak. South Korea's junior Kosdaq stock index on Monday reclaimed the 1,000 mark for the first time in four years, reaching its highest level in over 25 years

sources.name: MK (Maeil Kyungjae)
sources.original_text: The KOSDAQ index surpassed 1,000 for the first time in about four years. As of 9:15 a.m. on the 26th, the KOSDAQ is trading at 1011.82, up 1.80% from the previous trading day.

indices.verification_note: KOSDAQ 1,064.41 (Jan 26 close) confirmed. 25년 만의 최고치. 3개 출처 일치.

indices.name: Vietnam VN-Index
indices.original_text: Vietnam's main stock market index, the VN, fell to 1885 points on January 21, 2026. Historically, the Vietnam Ho Chi Minh Stock Index reached an all time high of 1918.46 in January of 2026.

sources.name: Trading Economics
sources.original_text: Vietnam's main stock market index, the VN, fell to 1885 points on January 21, 2026, losing 0.44% from the previous session. Over the past month, the index has climbed 7.68% and is up 51.74% compared to the same time last year. Historically, the Vietnam Ho Chi Minh Stock Index reached an all time high of 1918.46 in January of 2026.

rates.name: US Treasury 10Y
rates.original_text: The yield on the US 10-year Treasury note steadied around 4.24% on Wednesday after rising in the previous session, as investors awaited the Federal Reserve's widely expected decision to hold interest rates steady.

rates.name: Fed Funds Rate
rates.original_text: The Federal Reserve is widely expected to leave the federal funds rate unchanged at the 3.5%–3.75% target range in its January 2026 meeting, pausing its easing cycle after three consecutive rate cuts last year.

sources.name: Trading Economics
sources.original_text: The Federal Reserve is widely expected to leave the federal funds rate unchanged at the 3.5%–3.75% target range in its January 2026 meeting. The benchmark interest rate in the United States was last recorded at 3.75 percent.

sources.name: FRED (St. Louis Fed)
sources.original_text: Effective Federal Funds Rate (EFFR) Observations 2026-01-22: 3.64

rates.name: Bank of Korea Base Rate
rates.original_text: The Bank of Korea unanimously kept its base rate unchanged at 2.5% for a fifth consecutive meeting in its first policy decision of 2026, in line with market expectations.

sources.name: Trading Economics
sources.original_text: The Bank of Korea unanimously kept its base rate unchanged at 2.5% for a fifth consecutive meeting in its first policy decision of 2026, in line with market expectations.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.original_text: Bank of Korea holds rates, signals end to easing cycle to safeguard FX stability. BOK Keeps base rate unchanged at 2.50% as expected

rates.verification_note: 2.50% 3개 출처 완벽 일치. 2024년 10월부터 100bp 인하 후 동결 사이클 진입.

USD_KRW.original_text: The USD/KRW exchange rate fell to 1,423.8800 on January 28, 2026, down 0.48% from the previous session. The South Korean won strengthened to around 1,428 per dollar on Wednesday, extending gains to its strongest level in almost three months.
